title: Device Settings - Headset connected on Settings screen
scenario: Device Settings page correctly updates available options based on headset connection state (disconnected vs. connected)
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired but currently turned OFF.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the paired device name to enter Device Settings.
4. Observe the list of available options on the Device Settings page.
5. Turn ON the Poly Bluetooth headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
6. Wait for the headset to connect (LED indicator shows solid or blinking blue).
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate back to the Device Settings page for the same device.
8. Observe the list of available options again.
expected: When the headset is OFF, the Device Settings page should show only options relevant to a disconnected device (e.g., Remove Device, Forget Device, or similar). When the headset is turned ON and connected, the Device Settings page should display all available options (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, etc.) except Remove Device.
